description: Create a Delayed Match-to-Sample (DMS) experiment in PsychoPy Builder using abstract stimuli located in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli/. The task sequence must consist of a 0.5s fixation cross, a 1.5s central sample image, a 3.0s blank delay, and a choice phase where the match and a distractor are presented side-by-side for a mouse-click response. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/dms_conditions.csv defining at least 10 trials with columns for the sample image, distractor image, and correct answer position, ensuring the match appears on the Left (approx -0.4, 0) and Right (approx 0.4, 0) in an equal 50/50 distribution. Save the completed experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/dms_task.psyexp.
